9. 灹धान सिचव या सिचव, महारा玘 सरकार, जो लघु उ獸ोग या सू瀣म, लघु एवं म瀇यम उ獸म犘 के काय榁 से संबंिधत ह犘 सद瀡य, पदेन 10. लघु उ獸ोग भारती का 灹ितिनिध 1ई/11, 瀡वामी रामतीथ榁 नगर, झंडेवालान ए榉सट犆शन नई 琈द瀖ली-110055 सद瀡य, पदेन 11. इंिडया एसएमई फोरम के 灹ितिनिध 404, दुगा榁 चे瀓बस榁, वीरा इंडि瀡灩यल ए瀡टेट, वीरा देसाई रोड, अंधेरी (पf”pम), मुंबई-400053 सद瀡य, पदेन 12. फेडरेशन ऑफ इंिडयन माइ灙ो एंड 瀡माल एंड मीिडयम इंटर灹ाइजेज (एफआईएसएमई) के 灹ितिनिध, बी-4/161, सफदरजंग एं榉लेव, नई 琈द瀖ली-110029 सद瀡य, पदेन 13. अपर सिचव, भारत सरकार और िवकास आयु猴 (सू瀣म, लघु एवं म瀇यम उ獸म), सू瀣म, लघु एवं म瀇यम उ獸म मं灴ालय सद瀡य, सिचव [फा. सं. 2/3(3)/2016-एमएसएमई नीित] राम मोहन िम炈ा, अपर सिचव एवं िवकास आयु猴 (एमएसएमई) MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRIES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd August, 2019 S.O. 2788(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 7 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Committee for a period of two years from the date of publication of this notification, consisting of the following members, namely:- 1. Secretary to the Government of India in the Chairperson, ex-officio Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 2. Secretary to the Government of India or his representative Member, ex-officio not below the rank of Joint Secretary in the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship 3. Secretary to the Government of India or his representative Member, ex-officio not below the rank of Joint Secretary in the Ministry of Labour and Employment -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 4. Joint Secretary dealing with Agro and Rural Industry Member, ex-officio in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 5. Joint Secretary dealing with Small and Medium Enterprises Member, ex-officio in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 6. Financial Advisor in the Ministry of Member, ex-officio Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 7. Principal Secretary or Secretary Member, ex-officio to the Government of Rajasthan, dealing with Small Scale Industries or Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 8. Principal Secretary or Secretary to the Member, ex-officio Government of Bihar, dealing with Small Scale Industries or Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 9. Principal Secretary or Secretary to the Government of Member, ex-officio Maharashtra, dealing with Small Scale Industries or Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises 10. Representative of Laghu Udyog Bharati, 1E/11, Swami Member, ex-officio Ramtirath Nagar, Jhandewalan Extension, New Delhi-110055 11. Representative of India SME Forum, 404, Member, ex-officio Durga Chambers, Veera Industrial Estate, Veera Desai Road, Andheri (W), Mumbai-400053 12. Representative of Federation of Indian Micro and Small Member, ex-officio and Medium enterprises (FISME), B-4/161, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi-110029 13. Additional Secretary to the Government of India and Member Secretary Development Commissioner (Micro, Small and Medium enterprises) in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises. [F. No. 2/3(3)/2016-MSME Pol.] RAM MOHAN MISHRA, Addl.
